statements.__comment: Link LoadBalancer to Container via ECSTask network interface path
statements.query: MATCH (lb:LoadBalancer {lastupdated: $UPDATE_TAG})-[:EXPOSE]->(ip:EC2PrivateIp)<-[:PRIVATE_IP_ADDRESS]-(ni:NetworkInterface)<-[:NETWORK_INTERFACE]-(task:ECSTask)-[:HAS_CONTAINER]->(c:Container) MERGE (lb)-[r:EXPOSE]->(c) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
